chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett.No.D-1708 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For directions For orders on CMA No.41/2025 (C/A) 22.10.2025 Mr. Mansoor Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** Learned counsel for the petitioner has filed a statement, which is taken on record. He submits that the petitioner has now obtained a disability certificate from the Medical Assessment Board constituted under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018. It is further submitted that an application for appointment was submitted to the Deputy Commissioner, Sukkur, on 12.09.2025. However, despite this, the Deputy Commissioner, Sukkur, has failed to comply with the directions contained in the order dated 19.11.2024, which amounts to contempt of court. Learned Additional Advocate General submits that, in compliance with the referred order, a meeting of the District Recruitment Committee was convened. However, he requests time to convene a fresh meeting of the Committee. At his request, time is allowed. The Deputy Commissioner, Sukkur, is directed to convene a fresh meeting of the District Recruitment Committee within one month, in accordance with the directions contained in the earlier order(s) of this Court, and to consider the case of the petitioner strictly in accordance with law, subject to obtaining the current vacancy position from all relevant respondents/departments. The listed CMA stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
